scenarios.invariant: Process liveness stays available, readiness returns 503, operations become unknown rather than healthy, and private exception text is not exposed.
Agent and scheduler health become unknown, and the scheduler refuses to call the mutating endpoint before a durable attempt can be opened.
An ok:false or non-success target response rejects the awaited scheduled invocation and cannot be recorded as successful.
Provider exceptions or ambiguous results enter reconciliation-required state and are not retried or marked sent automatically.
The independent monitor reports component failure using bounded GETs without mutating customer or production state.

remaining_evidence: Independent provider receipt and human acknowledgement
